name: Kitoku Shinryo Co., Ltd.
summary: Kitoku Shinryo Co., Ltd. develops and sells rice in Japan and internationally. It also sells feed and feed raw materials; develops and sells value-added products, such as protein-adjusted rice; manufactures confectionery and processed food rice flour; and sells glutinous rice and rice flour. The company was founded in 1882 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
